_comment: Copy to benefactor.json (next to the disks) to tune. Env vars override these.
_comment3: Extra HORIZONTAL reach (px) for pickup + interaction, on top of vanilla. Vertical reach is unchanged.
_comment4: Key bindings. Each value is a comma-separated list of CHORDS; a chord is keys joined by '+'. Names: Up/Down/Left/Right, Space, Return, LShift/RShift, LCtrl/Ctrl/RCtrl, Tab, single letters/digits. Omit any line to keep the default shown.
